title: Canada Disability Benefit in MSCA - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada Disability Benefit in MSCA
If you qualify for the Canada Disability Benefit, you will find your invitation to apply letter in My Service Canada Account (MSCA).
Important: You can't apply for the Canada Disability Benefit in MSCA, To apply or to find more information, visit Canada Disability Benefit .
Once registered or signed in, go to the “Canada Disability Benefit” section on your MSCA dashboard.
Register or Sign in to MSCA

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
